codeReview.summary: Commit c697d60 wires all six requested engine events in `DynamicsEngine::compute_and_emit_for_tension` and updates `PreviousDynamics` tracking for compensating strategy state. The implementation covers upward/downward urgency threshold crossings, horizon drift transition emissions, first-time compensating strategy detection, and reverse-transition events (`OscillationResolved`, `NeglectResolved`, `ResolutionLost`) with first-cycle guards via default previous-state values. This satisfies the feature description and assigned fulfills assertions (VAL-EVT-001..010 and VAL-EVT-015..019).

summary: PASS: Feature `sdcore-engine-event-wiring` is correctly implemented; no blocking or non-blocking code issues were found in reviewed scope.
